items.title: Man Utd add Nottingham Forest flop and World Cup star to transfer shortlist – but may NOT buy another midfielder
items.summary: MANCHESTER UNITED are considering a shock move for Danilo after also being given fresh hope of landing Aurelien Tchouameni. The Red Devils bolstered their midfield options by sealing a bargain deal for Youri Tielemans earlier this month. United chief Michael Carrick has also splashed £50million on A

items.title: Marcus Rashford hit with another brutal snub as Barcelona sign Champions League star after £70m Anthony Gordon transfer
items.summary: MANCHESTER UNITED outcast Marcus Rashford's hopes of sealing a quickfire return to Barcelona are all but over. items.title: Modric, 40, signs new AC Milan deal
items.summary: AC Milan midfielder Luka Modric - who turns 41 in September - signs a one-year contract extension at the club.

items.title: World Matchplay Darts LIVE! Anderson falls behind vs Van Duijvenbode in quarter-finals
F1 considering Malaysian GP return as 2026 replacement race
items.summary: Formula 1 bosses are in talks with organisers of the Malaysian Grand Prix to see the Sepang race make a surprise return to the calendar this year as a stand-in event.

items.title: Arokodare forces Wolves training to be cancelled
items.summary: Wolves striker Tolu Arokodare forces the cancellation of a training session as he refuses to leave the pitch.

items.title: Chelsea paid Aston Villa £117m for Morgan Rogers. Is he the right fit?
items.summary: The England attacker thrives when he can gallop into space but Xabi Alonso’s best team built attacks slowly By Opta Analyst It quickly became apparent this summer that Aston Villa would not be holding on to Morgan Rogers. items.title: Arsenal preparing £70MILLION transfer bid for Bruno Guimaraes after star, 28, told Newcastle he wants to join Gunners
items.summary: ARSENAL are preparing a £70million bid for Newcastle captain Bruno Guimaraes. The Gunners want to sign a new midfielder this summer and the Brazilian is their prime target. items.title: Italy confirm Ancelotti approach before Guardiola
items.summary: Italy held discussions with Carlo Ancelotti to become their national team manager before opening talks with Pep Guardiola.

items.title: Can Hibs recover from calamity in Kosovo?
items.summary: Hibernian’s hopes of reaching the Conference League are in jeopardy after a shock 2-0 defeat by Malisheva, with head coach David Gray saying his team "were way below the levels required".
